notableEvents.label: Jordan Beck pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Beck flies out to left fielder Ramón Laureano.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Campusano doubles (6) on a line drive to right fielder Jordan Beck. Luis Campusano to 3rd. Luis Campusano advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by right fielder Jordan Beck.
